rationale: No bake-off has been run on a 32GB m-series machine. The 32GB tier has different model-size constraints than the 128GB tier (the 35B-A3B class may be too large; a 14B-dense or 8B-MoE pick is more likely the right answer). Community contributions welcome via #117. Until a recommendation lands, `darkmux swap recommended` errors with this explanation; operators select a profile manually.
not_validated_against: everything — no validated workload data exists for this tier
